Hi, I'm Bryce Walsh.

I'm a software engineer and data scientist who is interested in leveraging these skills for the energy transition.

Currently, I work as a Software Engineer at Lockheed Martin Space on Ground Control software.

When I'm not coding, I'm somewhere in the mountains doing something dumb on my feet or skis, listening to music, or reading a fiction or fantasy novel.
